LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ORKUT BUYUKKOKTEN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 9, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert I. Kligman, (415)362-9545 for Defendants/Moving parties Orkut Buyukkokten et al.

Not argured. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ORKUT BUYUKKOKTEN's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is GRANTED. Defendant resides in Santa Clara and some of the real property at issue in this case is located in Santa Clara. Unauthorized sur-reply is stricken. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Continued To Feb-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT ORKUT BUYUKKOKTEN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE, the motion will be heard in Department 501 on February 25, 2016, at 9:30 a.m. The amended complaint alleges a quiet title claim and Department 501 handles all quiet title and real property ownership dispute motions pursuant to SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2016 Continued To Feb-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT ORKUT BUYUKKOKTEN'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is continued to February 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give the opposing party an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
